title: Raw-Friendly Vietnamese Khus Khus Bowl
description: A twist on traditional Vietnamese cuisine, this dish features khus khus for a crumbly texture and fermented kimchi for a tangy kick. Perfect for a raw-friendly meal or a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: khus khus
ingredients.notes: use high-quality, raw khus khus for best results

ingredients.name: fermented kimchi
ingredients.notes: homemade or store-bought, chopped into small pieces

ingredients.name: lime juice
ingredients.notes: freshly squeezed, or use bottled juice

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: use a flaky sea salt or Himalayan pink salt

instructions: In a large bowl, combine khus khus, fermented kimchi, and shredded coconut.
